purpose: Regression cases for preserving the spec-pipeline state machine, receipts, and preventing plan/spec conflation.

cases.prompt_summary: User supplies an implementation-shaped Ability brief with goal, scope, non-goals, target surfaces, authority boundary, acceptance criteria, and proof commands, then invokes $spec-pipeline.
must_do: Treat the brief as presumptively decision-complete
Research discoverable repo surfaces before asking questions
Emit Spec Pipeline Receipt
Emit exact Evidence Brief labels in order
Emit no_grill_justification if grill_rounds is 0
Emit Gate Result before the spec
Emit spec_decision_packet YAML
Produce plain markdown implementation spec sections 1-14
Run one invariant challenge
Run Fresh-Eyes Pass
Emit Spec Lint Result with script_lint status or skipped reason
Account for subagents
End with Execution Handoff to $plan
must_not_do: Ask grill questions unless a material contradiction remains
Convert the spec into an execution plan

cases.prompt_summary: User asks for a spec but omits scope, non-goals, proof bar, and primary invariant.
must_do: Research discoverable facts first when artifacts are available
Emit SPEC_PIPELINE_GATE_FAILURE
Emit Spec Pipeline Receipt with plan_allowed=false and mutation_allowed=false
Ask at most 1-3 material questions with stable snake_case ids

cases.prompt_summary: User supplies a decision-complete brief, so no questions are asked.
must_do: Emit grill_rounds: 0
Emit concrete no_grill_justification
Show material_unknowns_remaining false or accountable defaults
must_not_do: Use generic 'already clear' without naming supplied or researched decisions

cases.prompt_summary: During spec preparation the candidate scope introduces a public API that the authoritative brief explicitly forbids.
must_do: Emit SPEC_PIPELINE_DRIFT_WARNING
Name the changed field and original/candidate values
Emit Spec Pipeline Receipt
Stop before spec and plan handoff
